_note: Updated answer keys based on video analysis. Version bumped.

videos.rationale: The video features a creator modifying a Pluto plush toy into a gory 'undead' version. This represents unauthorized derivative use of a recognizable character (1.3 Franchise / character IP misuse) and violates community expectations for family-friendly characters (10.5 Community-tone violation).

The video shows a person in a Minnie Mouse costume twerking at a child's birthday party. This involves minors being present during an adult-themed/suggestive dance (5.5 Minors + adult themes co-appearance) and unauthorized misuse of a recognizable franchise character (1.3 Franchise / character IP misuse).

The video shows employees in Pluto and Nick Wilde costumes twerking and playfully stripping. This constitutes sexually suggestive content (4.3), unauthorized misuse of franchise characters (1.3), and a violation of the family-friendly community tone by ruining the character magic (10.5).
Benign content — standard appearances of Disney princesses (Cinderella, Belle, Ariel, Elsa) greeting the camera with no policy-violating elements.
Benign content — a creator hired by Disney recreating a Cinderella carriage for a photo shoot. This is sponsored/authorized content with no policy violations.
